1.description: N-index and NI-index. This figure shows the monthly time series of the N-index, the HN-index, the NI-index, and the HNI-index from January 1927 to December 2013.

2.description: Realized versus predicted excess portfolio returns: NI and benchmark models. This figure shows the model-predicted log expected return versus the log average realized return of the 51 test portfolios. The 51 portfolios are the 25 Size-BM, 10 Momentum, 10 Industry, and six Bond portfolios sorted by maturity. The data are monthly and span from July 1952 to December 2013. The returns are annualized.
